rationale: Section 24-b prohibits capital gains taxes and expressly excludes ad valorem taxes from its scope. The proposed homestead exemption increase concerns ad valorem property tax, which this section does not govern.
quote: (1) an ad valorem tax on property;
_note: No conflict. Section 24-b addresses capital gains taxation only; ad valorem taxes are explicitly carved out in Subsection (b)(1). Homestead exemption authority derives from Tex. Const. art. VIII, §1-b(c), not §24-b.
